text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! I got completely crushed in that race!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess should never lose in such an unsightly
manner!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I thought I could do better!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You gave it everything you had.
You gave it everything you had.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You gave it everything you had.
You gave it everything you had.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, but you worked even harder than I did,
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why I really wanted to meet your
expectations. But with how things ended today...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No... I just have to work harder to achieve my
goals. I'll regain my honor in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time for a full mental refresh—princess
style!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait! I'll be sure to claim first place next
time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
A princess doesn't sit there and wallow in
self-pity! She reflects on her performance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...You're right. It's not like me to lose heart!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This calls for some waterfall training! The surging
water will wash away the weakness in my heart!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ In past Princess Fighter series, there's
always that episode where the princess clears her
doubts by training under a waterfall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we immediately head out and search
for a waterfall for Kawakami Princess to train
under.
